focus: Recurring merchant growth, merchandising, storefront optimization, and retention loops.

agent_submissions.notes: Pilot agent 1 for Ecommerce / Merchant Growth. Focus on repeated domain loops, not generic tooling.

agent_brief.focus: Recurring merchant growth, merchandising, storefront optimization, and retention loops.
agent_brief.distribution_lens: Prefer domains that ambitious online people would use, share, debate, or brag about on X.
candidate_requirements: Return 1-3 candidate domain chips only
Every candidate must describe a repeated specialization loop
Every candidate must describe a repeated mastery loop
Prefer domains with talkability, social spread, or obvious creator / builder pull
Reject personas, generic features, and vague workflow ideas

raw_candidates.label: Product Angle Test Loop
raw_candidates.description: A merchant workflow for repeatedly testing new product angles, hooks, and merchandising narratives against audience response.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated product angle test loop workflow inside the ecommerce / merchant growth wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Product Angle Test Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next product angle test loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Merchants often have enough products but not enough repeatable angle testing on what to say and emphasize.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Merchants often have enough products but not enough repeatable angle testing on what to say and emphasize.

agent_submissions.notes: Pilot agent 2 for Ecommerce / Merchant Growth. Focus on repeated domain loops, not generic tooling.

agent_brief.focus: Recurring merchant growth, merchandising, storefront optimization, and retention loops.
agent_brief.distribution_lens: Prefer domains that ambitious online people would use, share, debate, or brag about on X.
candidate_requirements: Return 1-3 candidate domain chips only
Every candidate must describe a repeated specialization loop
Every candidate must describe a repeated mastery loop
Prefer domains with talkability, social spread, or obvious creator / builder pull
Reject personas, generic features, and vague workflow ideas

raw_candidates.label: Creator UGC Brief Loop
raw_candidates.description: A system for issuing, refining, and learning from repeated UGC creator briefs for ads and storefront growth.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated creator ugc brief loop workflow inside the ecommerce / merchant growth wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Creator UGC Brief Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next creator ugc brief loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Merchant growth is increasingly tied to how quickly teams can produce and tune creator-style ad inputs.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Merchant growth is increasingly tied to how quickly teams can produce and tune creator-style ad inputs.

agent_submissions.notes: Pilot agent 3 for Ecommerce / Merchant Growth. Focus on repeated domain loops, not generic tooling.

agent_brief.focus: Recurring merchant growth, merchandising, storefront optimization, and retention loops.
agent_brief.distribution_lens: Prefer domains that ambitious online people would use, share, debate, or brag about on X.

Every candidate must describe a repeated mastery loop
Prefer domains with talkability, social spread, or obvious creator / builder pull
Reject personas, generic features, and vague workflow ideas

raw_candidates.label: Merch Drop Timing Loop
raw_candidates.description: A recurring workflow for planning merch drops around audience heat, inventory, and creator momentum.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated merch drop timing loop workflow inside the ecommerce / merchant growth wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Merch Drop Timing Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next merch drop timing loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: A lot of ecommerce upside depends on timing drops into the right audience moment, not just stocking more items.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: A lot of ecommerce upside depends on timing drops into the right audience moment, not just stocking more items.
